summary: Guarantee Revalidation Feature - All tests PASSED. Backend APIs and Frontend UI verified. Fixed missing enrichment in participants list endpoint.
passed_tests: GET /api/invitations/{token} returns guarantee_revalidation=null when no flag ✓
GET /api/invitations/{token} returns guarantee_revalidation with requires_revalidation=true when flagged ✓
POST /api/invitations/{token}/reconfirm-guarantee creates new Stripe session and marks old guarantee as superseded ✓
POST /api/invitations/{token}/reconfirm-guarantee returns 400 if no revalidation needed ✓
Frontend InvitationPage: 'Reconfirmer ma garantie' button (data-testid='reconfirm-guarantee-btn') functional ✓
Frontend InvitationPage: revalidation reasons displayed (Décalage de date > 24h, Changement de ville) ✓
Frontend InvitationPage: response section shows amber warning icon when revalidation required ✓
Frontend InvitationPage: clicking reconfirm button redirects to Stripe checkout ✓
Minor modification scenario: NO revalidation banner when requires_revalidation=false ✓
Minor modification scenario: 'Garanti' badge shown instead of 'À reconfirmer' ✓
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: /app/backend/routers/participants.py - Added guarantee revalidation enrichment to list_participants endpoint (lines 102-113)
Backend invitations.py correctly returns guarantee_revalidation in GET /{token} response
Backend invitations.py POST /{token}/reconfirm-guarantee correctly creates new Stripe session and marks old guarantee as superseded
Backend appointments.py correctly enriches participants with guarantee_requires_revalidation in list endpoint
Frontend InvitationPage.js correctly displays revalidation banner, status badge, and reconfirm button
Frontend AppointmentDetail.js correctly displays 'À reconfirmer' badge for participants with guarantee_requires_revalidation=true
updated_files: /app/backend/routers/participants.py - Added guarantee revalidation enrichment to list_participants endpoint
seed_data_creation: Test guarantees created with requires_revalidation=true for testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Guarantee revalidation feature fully tested. Key data-testid values: guarantee-revalidation-banner, status-badge-revalidation, reconfirm-guarantee-btn, badge-revalidation-{participant_id}. The participants list endpoint was fixed to include guarantee_requires_revalidation enrichment. Stripe is in dev mode (sk_test_emergent) - returns simulated checkout URLs.

mocked_apis_list: Stripe (dev mode with sk_test_emergent key - simulates checkout URLs)

screenshots: .screenshots/invitation_revalidation_banner.png - Shows revalidation banner with amber styling, reasons, and reconfirm button
.screenshots/appointment_detail_revalidation_fixed.png - Shows 'À reconfirmer' badge on participant in AppointmentDetail
.screenshots/invitation_no_revalidation.png - Shows normal 'Garanti' badge when no revalidation needed

verified_features.invitation_page_revalidation_banner: Amber banner with warning icon, explanation text, reason badges, and 'Reconfirmer ma garantie' button
verified_features.invitation_page_status_badge: 'À reconfirmer' badge in header when revalidation required, 'Garanti' when not
verified_features.invitation_page_response_section: Amber warning icon and 'Garantie à reconfirmer' text when revalidation required
verified_features.reconfirm_button_functionality: Clicking button calls POST /api/invitations/{token}/reconfirm-guarantee and redirects to Stripe checkout
verified_features.appointment_detail_participant_badge: 'À reconfirmer' badge shown for participants with guarantee_requires_revalidation=true
verified_features.api_enrichment: Both /api/appointments/ and /api/participants/ endpoints enrich participants with guarantee_requires_revalidation
